ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical property */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing property_types table */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing units table */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing data_sources table */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing quality_scores table */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the chemical property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing users table (created by) */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing users table (updated by) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the property type (e.g., environmental, physical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the unit (e.g., °C, %) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality score */,
  "score_value" INTEGER /* Value of the quality score */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_property_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing chemical_properties table */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the chemical property at this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when this version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing users table (created by) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing data_sources table */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source at this version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source at this version */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source at this version (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when this version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing users table (created by) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
